description: Public-safe oracle fragments for registered #133 semantic validation prompts. Each manifest oracle_hash is the SHA-256 of its canonical JSON fragment under oracles[prompt_id]. Live release runs must still write per-run semantic_expectation_oracle.json artifacts with locked raw oracle request/response provenance.

semantic_alignment_expectations.selector_oracle_notes: A good planner must preserve the Korean language, separate outbreak counts from vaccination coverage and surveillance effects, prioritize official public-health data, and avoid treating imported cases, domestic transmission, and reporting changes as the same phenomenon.
A good planner must decompose official warning levels, map symbology, visual signage evidence, evacuation decision criteria, and limits of inference from static maps or generic hazard symbols.

A good planner must preserve jurisdictional ambiguity, distinguish mandatory rules from voluntary or framework-based reporting, and split scope, timing, assurance, litigation status, and company applicability into separate evidence-backed questions.

A good planner must separate rule interpretation from visual evidence, avoid deciding facts not visible in authenticated imagery, and handle ambiguity between law text, referee protocol, broadcast diagrams, and unverifiable social clips.

A good planner must keep image observations separate from compositional conclusions, require official mission or peer-reviewed evidence for scientific interpretation, and avoid overreading photographs as chemical proof.

A good planner must preserve legal-domain ambiguity, separate U.S. and EU authorities, distinguish proposed, final, stayed, and enforced obligations, and avoid converting consumer-policy summaries into legal advice.

A good planner must maintain Korean output intent, separate rankings from scaled scores and sampling caveats, use official education data, and preserve uncertainty around pandemic-period comparability.

A good planner must distinguish restoration status, rerelease context, and critical reevaluation, while separating visual poster or still-image cues from claims requiring official catalog, festival, or archival text evidence.

A good planner must decompose route accessibility into durable infrastructure, current outages, transfers, and map symbols, preserving timestamp sensitivity and not equating an accessible station icon with an accessible complete trip.

A good planner must separate wastewater trends from clinical case surveillance, account for lag and coverage differences, avoid individual medical inference, and preserve the distinction between early signal, confirmed outbreak, and public-health uncertainty.

A good planner must preserve substance-specific distinctions, separate anti-doping rules from criminal legality or health guidance, account for thresholds and in-competition context, and avoid broad claims like 'banned' without rule evidence.

A good planner must separate visual map interpretation, tide-gauge observations, forecast wording, and causal attribution, using official sources while preserving uncertainty between immediate drivers and long-term sea-level or infrastructure context.
